message:
refactor(fcp-store): consolidate rate limiter state into single RwLock

Combine separate RwLock<u32> tokens and RwLock<Instant> last_refill
into a single RwLock<RateLimiterState> struct to eliminate double-lock
acquisition and ensure atomic updates to token count and refill
timestamp.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
